title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at Juspay South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at Juspay South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Juspay South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Madurai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Juspay South Asia Partners:
Juspay South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juspay South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
